filter.buttonHint: Open the filter menu to view all, open, resolved, or burned entries

active.title: Nothing waiting right now
active.desc: Your inner garden is growing gently
active.ctaHint: Go to the record screen and capture your first entry

resolved.title: No resolved entries yet
resolved.desc: Record your feelings and make peace with yourself

burned.title: No burned words yet
burned.desc: Release heavy feelings through the burn ritual
burned.ctaHint: Go to the record screen and capture your first entry

all.title: Start your first mood entry
all.desc: Every expression is a way of tending to your heart
all.ctaHint: Go to the record screen and capture your first entry

weatherAdvice.sunny: A good day to feel light
weatherAdvice.cloudy: A good day to talk it through

entryCard.burnedTitle: Turned to ash and carried away
entryCard.burnedHintExpanded: Tap to collapse · long press to delete forever
entryCard.burnedHintCollapsed: Tap to view original · long press to delete forever
entryCard.cardExpandHint: Expand to see full content and actions
entryCard.resolveHint: Mark this entry resolved after you've talked it through or let it go
entryCard.burnHint: Burn this entry to release the feeling — content cannot be restored
entryCard.deleteHint: Delete this entry — it cannot be undone

minEntries.title: Heads up
minEntries.message: You need at least 3 mood entries to generate a forecast

generateFailed.title: Couldn't generate forecast
generateFailed.message: Something went wrong while generating your forecast. Please try again.

playbackFailed.title: Playback failed
playbackFailed.bodyRetry: Couldn't play the recording — please try again

moveToRecycle.title: Move to recycle bin
moveToRecycle.message:
Move this entry to the recycle bin? You can restore it from Profile.

"{{excerpt}}"

burn.title: Burn it out
burn.message:
Burn this memory for good?

You'll keep an ash trace, but the words won't come back.

deleteAsh.title: Delete forever
deleteAsh.message: Delete this ash forever? You won't be able to recover it.
